prose: Fukui reactivity indices for ferrocene were computed using the GFN2-xTB method (xtb backend) in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the user-provided file: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`. The most electrophilic site is the Iron (Fe) atom (atom index 10, label 11) with an f+ value of 0.22885456. The most nucleophilic site is also the Iron (Fe) atom (atom index 10, label 11) with an f- value of 0.25938191.
